decision: Pending — Entra registration, NAS OAuth rollout, and ChatGPT Work validation

source.workingTree: Pending extraction/performance and OAuth compatibility build. The exact 2026 Family Budgeting.xlsx ChatGPT failure is repaired and live-tested, the optimized developer-mode app logo matches the local OneDrive asset, the 19-tool ChatGPT contract and 84-tool full contract pass, and all 162 mock Graph tests pass. Immutable-cache parity, NAS rollout of this commit, Entra registration, and the ChatGPT Work host loop remain outstanding.

offlineGates.name: Read-only OneDrive doctor and tenant checks

installed.scope: No Auth descriptor repair immutable cache: full isolated CRUD, Office, sharing, versioning, safety, encrypted-auth, and cleanup beta

deployment.connectorSmoke: Fresh No Auth app registration exposed 84/84 noauth action descriptors and completed authenticated config, profile, drive, root listing, and preset validation in Chat with five passes, one warning, and zero failures.

workbookReadRepair.observedFailure: EPERM: operation not permitted, chmod '/data', followed by EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/data/pycache' after the first repair.
workbookReadRepair.cause: The Office helper first hardened the pre-existing NAS mount root and then placed disposable Python bytecode under that non-writable mount.
workbookReadRepair.fix: Do not chmod the storage mount root; keep Python bytecode in a private temporary directory outside /data and retain 0700 hardening for managed writable state.

listingLogo.observedAppearance: square blue OneDrive cloud matching the local asset
listingLogo.storageBehavior: Developer-mode app logos are stored at app creation and are not changed by MCP metadata refresh.

warnings: The account does not currently contain the default Desktop or Pictures/Screenshots preset targets; doctor reports these as warnings.
ChatGPT Work shows an incorrect expired-connection card for the custom No Auth app before dispatching a tool call; the identical fresh app passes in Chat.
The active optimized developer-mode app now shows the correct OneDrive logo; future logo changes still require recreating the app because MCP metadata refresh does not update stored artwork.

Synology administrative verification used HTTPS over the LAN fallback with insecure TLS certificate validation enabled after the Tailscale endpoint failed; install a trusted DSM certificate or certificate pinning to remove this operational warning.

blockedCoverage.reason: The connected live account is personal; the business backend passes mock coverage.
The connected live account is personal; organization behavior passes mock coverage.
Microsoft Graph rejected the isolated plus-address recipient with sharingFailed; the harness verified that no permission was created and continued with anonymous-link grant/revoke coverage.
The healthy existing credential and consent remain untouched; suppression and mock flow coverage pass.
The existing credential remains untouched; memory-only logout passes.
Recycle-bin restore remains dry-run/mock tested; native version restore passes live.
The extraction/performance source commit is locally and live-ChatGPT tested but has not yet replaced the immutable cache or NAS image.
